repair_candidate.summary: Build a narrow replacement PR for #51868, preserving @emg110 attribution, to fix UTF-8 half-block QR/art rendering in web chat and sidebar markdown output where the source contributor branch is not maintainer-editable.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(ui): render half-block QR art in web chat
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary

This replacement PR carries forward the half-block UTF-8 QR/art rendering fix from source PR #51868 by @emg110. The original branch is not maintainer-editable, so Clownfish is preserving the implementation path and attribution in a guarded replacement branch.

- Detect code blocks dominated by half-block characters used by text QR renderers.
- Apply tight monospace rendering for chat text and sidebar markdown so the blocks tile without gaps.
- Keep the markdown pipeline and sanitization behavior unchanged outside this narrow rendering case.

## Credit

Thanks @emg110 for the original source PR and proof in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/51868. This replacement keeps that contribution credited.

## Validation

- `pnpm -s vitest run ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/run-controls.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:changed`
- Codex `/review` must pass cleanly before merge.
validation_commands: pnpm -s vitest run ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/grouped-render.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/run-controls.test.ts
credit_notes: Credit @emg110 for the original half-block QR rendering fix and screenshot/proof.
Replacement PR body should say it carries forward the source PR implementation/credit because the original branch is not maintainer-editable.
